products.title: Ultimate Halter Cross Back Top - Coffee Bean
products.body_html:
A new style has landed. Meet the Halter Cross Back Top, crafted from our premium Ultimate fabric. Designed with a flattering adjustable bonded halter neckline, it features a cross-over back detail and removable cups for versatile support. Style it with the matching Ultimate Ultra Crop Shorts for a complete coordinated look.


→ Outer Fabric: 79% Polyamide, 21% Elastane
→ Lining Fabric: 90% Nylon, 10% Elastane
→ Adjustable bonded halter neck strap
→ Smoothing & sculpting
→ Medium compression
→ 4-way stretch
→ Internal shelf bra, with removable padding


Take good care of me:

→ Wash inside out
→ Wash on a gentle setting
→ Wash on low temperature, no more than 30 degrees
→ Wash by hand if possible
→ Do not tumble dry
→ Do not overload washing machine

products.title: Ultimate Double Layer Crop Shorts - Coffee Bean/Dusty Brown
products.body_html:
Our Double Layered Crop Shorts are an activewear wardrobe staple. Made from a new better than ever premium Ultimate fabric. These shorts are squat-proof and sweat-wicking, helping to keep you cool during workouts. The flattering high-rise double layered waistband offers support while contouring the body, and the lightweight four-way stretch fabric ensures all-day comfort and ease of movement. For a complete look, style them with the matching bra.

 

→ 79% Polyamide, 21% Elastane
→ Medium compression
→ Smoothing & sculpting
→ Squat proof
→ Weightless feel
→ Crop length, hitting mid-thigh
→ Dustry brown double layer at waist

 

Take good care of me:

→ Wash inside out
→ Wash on a gentle setting
→ Wash on low temperature, no more than 30 degrees
→ Wash by hand if possible
→ Do not tumble dry
→ Do not overload washing machine

products.title: ADA Oversized Sweatshirt - Marshmallow White/Midnight Blue
products.body_html:
The Sweatshirt is an everyday essential, designed with an oversized fit, dropped shoulders and a embroidered logo at the front. Crafted from 100% organic cotton loop-back fabric for all-day comfort. Pair it with our Ultimate Leggings for an effortless look that's perfect for lounging, running errands and everything in between!

 

→ 100% Organic Cotton loop-back
→ 420gsm medium weight
→ Midnight Blue embroidered 'ADA' varsity logo on centre chest


How to care for your organic cotton sweats.

Our new organic cotton is a natural fibre and should be washed with care:

→ Wash cold, on a gentle setting - do not wash on a hot cycle as the natural fibres will warp and reduce in size
→ Avoid using fabric conditioner - it clogs the pores causing the fabric to lose their natural softness
→ Gently reshape when wet
→ Lay flat to dry & make sure to remove from the washer promptly
→ Iron on a warm temp to remove any creases

products.title: ADA Oversized Sweatshirt - Blossom Blue/Buttercream
products.body_html:
Our Oversized Sweatshirt, featuring an oversized silhouette is easy to dress up or down. Clean-cut from our new 100% Organic Cotton loop-back fabric and features an ADA screen-printed logo. To get the laid-back athleisure look, style with the our ultimate leggings, perfect for lounging or coffee dates.

→ 100% Organic Cotton loop-back
→ 420gsm medium weight
→ Screen-printed 'ADA' varsity logo on centre chest

Take good care of me:
→ Wash inside out, on a gentle setting
→ Wash cold
→ Wash by hand if possible
→ Do not tumble dry or dry at high temperatures
→ Lay flat to dry
→ Reshape while damp
→ Do not overload washing machine
→ Ironing once dry will help regain softness of fabric

Please note there may be a slight colour difference between the activewear and sweats due to the dyeing process and composition of the fabrics.

products.title: Varsity Oversized Hoodie - Clay Beige
products.body_html:
The Oversized Hoodie is a feel-good piece. Made from our new 100% Organic Cotton, this hoodie combines comfort and style with its relaxed oversized fit. Featuring an applique patch varsity logo, dropped shoulders and large kangaroo pocket. Wear it on casual days with the matching sweatpants.

→ 100% Organic Cotton Loop-back
→ 3-piece hood fit
→ Applique patch varsity logo
→ 420GSM medium weight

How to care for your organic cotton sweats.

Our new organic cotton is a natural fibre and should be washed with care:

→ Wash cold, on a gentle setting, inside out - do not wash on a hot cycle as the natural fibres will warp and reduce in size
→ Avoid using fabric conditioner - it clogs the pores causing the fabric to lose their natural softness
→ Gently reshape when wet
→ Lay flat to dry & make sure to remove from the washer promptly
→ Iron on a warm temp to remove any creases
